🔧 SYSTEM — Telegram Organization Deployed 3 solutions live: 1. Message Tags — Every Telegram message now starts with a category tag (BUILD, EMAIL, SAMSON, AP, etc). Search any tag in Telegram to find all messages of that type. 2. Telegram Log Dashboard — ops.norrisutilities.com/internal/telegram_log.html Searchable, filterable history of every message sent. Filter by category, date range, keyword. Click to expand. 3. Overnight Digest — New flag: python3 morning_brief.py --digest Groups all overnight messages by category into one compact summary. Scripts updated: portal_data_sync, qb_data_loader, news_monitor, universal_capture, agent_runner v3, morning_brief All existing scripts (v4, email, samson, AP, shipping, voice, watchdog, followup, remarkable, invoicing) already had tags + logging.

🧬 SYSTEM — EVOLUTION ENGINE DEPLOYED 5 protection layers active: Layer 1: Pre-commit guard — blocks FlexPro Armor®, Armor Guard, Gridco violations before they commit Layer 2: Post-commit audit — catches anything that slips through (existing) Layer 3: Auto-fix chain — audit → fix → evolution check (every 30 min via launchd) Layer 4: Evolution engine — pattern detection, service monitoring, auto-restart downed services, daily summary at 6 PM Layer 5: Nightly polish — deep scan at 2 AM (existing) The portal now protects and improves itself.
